headline: How Xcel’s Google Data Center and EV Grid Projects Will Impact Xcel Energy (XEL) Investors
summary: Xcel Energy recently highlighted in its latest Sustainability Report how it has been strengthening its grid, cutting power-sector carbon emissions from 2005 levels, and supporting new projects such as powering a Google data center and an electric school bus depot with bidirectional charging. These initiatives underscore how Xcel Energy is using large-scale clean energy and grid modernization partnerships to align customer demand, data center growth, and vehicle electrification with its...

headline: AI CEO On CNBC: ‘We Are Replacing Junior Employees with AI.’ The Only Solution is a Tax on AI and Robots

headline: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Techs Fall As AI Trade Cools; Jobs Report Looms
summary: Dow Jones futures rose slightly early Friday, while S&P 500 futures and especially Nasdaq futures fell. The May jobs report is on tap before the open. S&P Dow Jones Indices announced late Thursday that it won't fast track SpaceX and other upcoming megacap IPOs such as Anthropic and OpenAI into the benchmark index.

content.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Techs Fall As AI Trade Cools; Jobs Report Looms
content.summary: Dow Jones futures rose slightly early Friday, while S&P 500 futures and especially Nasdaq futures fell. The May jobs report is on tap before the open. S&P Dow Jones Indices announced late Thursday that it won't fast track SpaceX and other upcoming megacap IPOs such as Anthropic and OpenAI into the benchmark index.
